package rulecoverage

func NegativeTestBootstrapPackageReusedByProductionWiring() string {
    ruleID := "test_bootstrap_package_reused_by_production_wiring"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Production startup code that imports test-only bootstrap helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
